name: Black & White Bean Salad
recipeIngredient: 2 tbsp Olive oil or Vegetable oil
15 oz Great Northern Beans, drained and rinsed
15 oz Black Beans, drained and rinsed
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium skillet, sauté onions in oil until crisp-tender.
2. Remove from heat and let cool to warm.
3. Stir in vinegar, red pepper, parsley, garlic, NutraSweet (tm) Spoonful (tm), salt, and pepper.
4. In a serving bowl, combine both types of beans.
5. Pour the onion mixture over the beans.
6. Mix well and serve.
Makes 8 servings
Nutritional Information: Serving size 1/8 recipe; Diabetic food exchange 1 starch, 1 vegetable, 1/2 fat.
